methodsAttempted.query: site:sdu.edu.cn 山东大学 生成式人工智能 人工智能 学术诚信 指南 政策
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official SDU subdomain material but no clear university-wide student, staff, or teaching AI policy; several results were funder, procurement, or general research material.

methodsAttempted.query: site:sdu.edu.cn "ChatGPT" OR "AIGC" OR "生成式人工智能" "山东大学"
methodsAttempted.notes: This search located the official Journal of Shandong University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) notice on generative-AI tool use for submissions, plus journal articles and faculty/research pages.

methodsAttempted.query: site:sdu.edu.cn "人工智能" "学术诚信" "山东大学" -journal
methodsAttempted.notes: Search results were mostly official event, lecture, and college news pages about AI ethics and academic integrity rather than binding policy pages.
journal.sdu.edu.cn is an official Shandong University journal subdomain and the page footer/title identifies the publisher as 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one policy-specific Shandong University source: a Journal of Shandong University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) editorial notice governing generative-AI tool use in journal submissions. No university-wide public AI policy was found in the searched official SDU domains, so claims are scoped to journal submissions and editorial workflow only.

targets.sourceTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事

stopConditions: Use only actual text from the official SDU journal notice for evidence snippets.
Scope claims to Journal of Shandong University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) submissions and editorial process.
Do not infer university-wide student, staff, teaching, procurement, or research policy from the journal notice.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDF, screenshots, or full normalized text in Git.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事

artifacts.claimText: The Journal of Shandong University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) does not accept generative-AI tools as paper authors and states that human authors independently bear academic responsibility for research outputs.

citation.citationTitle: Shandong University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For journal submissions, the notice supports generative-AI use only in auxiliary stages such as language polishing, literature retrieval, data organization and analysis, and idea development, and does not accept submissions where AI directly generates the research framework, main content, or core viewpoints.

citation.citationTitle: Shandong University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For journal submissions involving generative-AI-assisted writing, authors are responsible for that use and should provide a generative-AI detection report when submitting; the journal screens submissions and rejects papers whose generative-AI detection ratio exceeds 20% at initial review.

citation.citationTitle: Shandong University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: To avoid copyright, privacy, security, and confidentiality risks, the journal notice states that the journal will not use publicly available generative-AI platforms to review papers during initial, re-review, or final-review stages.

citation.citationTitle: Shandong University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 1.本刊不接受任何生成式人工智能工具作为论文署名作者，所有研究成果的学术责任须由人类作者独立承担。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The journal does not accept generative-AI tools as paper authors and places academic responsibility on human authors.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 2.本刊支持生成式人工智能工具应用于学术研究，但仅限于语言润色、文献检索、数据整理与分析、思路开拓等辅助环节使用生成式人工智能工具。本刊不接受存在如下情形的投稿：（1）借助生成式人工智能技术直接生成论文研究框架、主体内容与核心观点，改写既有研究成果；（2）虚构生成式人工智能技术使用信息或隐瞒使用情况；（3）伪造或捏造文献、内容与数据等。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The journal supports AI only for auxiliary research tasks and does not accept submissions where AI directly generates framework, main content, or core viewpoints.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 3．作者应对论文使用生成式人工智能的情况负责，并承担相应法律与道德责任。若存在利用生成式人工智能工具辅助论文写作情形，作者在论文投稿时应提供生成式人工智能检测结果报告单。4.本刊保留对投稿及已刊发论文中生成式人工智能技术使用情况的审查权。在初审环节，将对所有投稿论文进行生成式人工智能检测，对生成式人工智能检测比例超过20%的论文作退稿处理。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Authors are responsible for AI use and should provide a detection report for AI-assisted writing; the journal screens submissions and rejects papers above a 20% AI-detection ratio at initial review.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
citation.publisher: 山东大学学报（哲学社会科学版）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的启事
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 5.为了避免可能产生的侵犯版权、隐私，违反安全和保密义务的风险，本刊承诺在论文初审、复审、终审各个环节不使用公开可用的生成式人工智能技术平台进行论文的评审工作。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The journal says it will not use publicly available generative-AI platforms to review papers at initial, re-review, or final-review stages.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.title: Shandong University staged AI policy source report
artifacts.summary: The only policy-specific official Shandong University source found in this pass is a Journal of Shandong University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) notice governing generative-AI tool use for journal submissions and editorial review. Claims are limited to that journal-submission context. Official SDU searches did not locate a public university-wide student, staff, teaching, procurement, or general research AI policy.
limitations: This staged report is metadata and source analysis only; it is not legal, academic, or compliance advice.
Claims are scoped to Journal of Shandong University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) submissions and editorial review because no broader official SDU AI policy source was found.
Rejected official SDU pages included an academic article page and an event/news listing, which were not used as policy evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
